title: Airflow Executable SDK Bundle Metadata
description: Build-time manifest declaring DAG and task identifiers exposed by an Airflow native-executable SDK bundle. See the Bundle Spec Format documentation in apache-airflow-providers-sdk-executable.

format_version.description: Bundle-spec version this manifest conforms to (currently '1.0').

sdk.description: Identifies the SDK that produced the bundle.

version.description: SDK version used at build time.

source.description: Original filename of the primary DAG source file (e.g. 'example.go'). The file's bytes are embedded in the bundle's source region; this field is a display name used by the Airflow UI.

dags.description: Mapping of dag_id to DAG entry. Every dag_id the bundle exposes must appear here.

dagEntry.description: Static description of a single DAG declared in the bundle.

tasks.description: Static list of task_ids declared in the DAG.
